study_title: Parent-of-origin effects on transcription and chromatin regulation in reproductive caste determination
design: Total RNA was isolated from individual whole frozen larvae collected at 192hpf withTRIzol/chloroform extraction followed by precipitation with isopropanol and treated with 1ul (2U/ul) TURBOTM DNase (Invitrogen). Libraries were prepared from 1ug total RNA using Illumina Stranded mRNA Prep kits with unique 5 and 3 index adapter pairs (IDT for Illumina RNA UD Indexes, Set A) and PCR amplified for 10 cycles. Samples were sequenced on a NextSeq 2000 platform by the Penn State Genomics Core Facility.
lab: Huck Institutes of the Life Sciences
